headline: Corteva Announces Executive Leadership Team of its Future Advanced Seed and Genetics Company
summary: Corteva Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) announced today the executive leadership team that will lead "SpinCo," the publicly-traded, advanced seed and genetics company resulting from the current company's planned separation in the fourth quarter of 2026.

raw.headline: Corteva Announces Executive Leadership Team of its Future Advanced Seed and Genetics Company
raw.summary: Corteva Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) announced today the executive leadership team that will lead "SpinCo," the publicly-traded, advanced seed and genetics company resulting from the current company's planned separation in the fourth quarter of 2026.

headline: Corteva Announces Executive Leadership Team of its Future Crop Protection Company
summary: Corteva Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) announced today the executive leadership team that will lead "New Corteva," the publicly-traded, differentiated crop protection company resulting from the current company's planned separation in the fourth quarter of 2026. This follows an earlier announcement naming Luke Kissam, former Albemarle Chairman, President and CEO, as the New Corteva CEO. Luke will join the current company on June 1.
